description: Production Kafka infrastructure observability dashboard for chrono-queue. Covers cluster health, consumer lag and throughput, producer reliability and latency, and broker resource/performance signals.

panels.title: Consumer Lag — Max

targets.expr: max(max by (service, topic, partition) (kafka_consumer_fetch_manager_records_lag_max{service=~"${worker_service:regex}|${dlq_service:regex}"})) or vector(0)

panels.description: Maximum consumer lag across topic+partition for selected consumer services.

panels.title: Under-Replicated Partitions
panels.description: Kafka broker under-replicated partitions. Any value > 0 is critical.

panels.title: Offline Partitions
panels.description: Kafka offline partitions. Any value > 0 indicates availability impact.

panels.title: ISR Shrink/s
panels.description: ISR shrink rate from broker JMX. Sustained non-zero indicates replication instability.

panels.title: Kafka Lag Trend (All Consumers)

targets.expr: sum(max by (service, topic, partition) (deriv(kafka_consumer_fetch_manager_records_lag_max{service=~"${worker_service:regex}|${dlq_service:regex}"}[10m]))) or vector(0)

panels.description: Lag trend slope across consumer services. Positive values indicate backlog growth; negative values indicate recovery.

panels.title: Records Consumed Rate by Topic (job-worker)
panels.description: Kafka record consumption rate by topic for job-worker.

panels.title: Consumer Lag by Topic — Current & Max
panels.description: Consumer lag (current and max) by topic across selected consumer services. Rising lag indicates consumers falling behind.

panels.title: Consumer Lag by Topic + Partition (Top 25)
panels.description: Partition-level lag visibility for actionable hotspot detection.

panels.title: Records Consumed Rate by Topic (dlq-service)
panels.description: Kafka record consumption rate by topic for dlq-service.

panels.title: Consumer Lag by Topic (dlq-service)
panels.description: Consumer lag (current and max) by topic for dlq-service.

panels.title: Consumer Fetch Rate (Partitions Assigned)
panels.description: Aggregate record consumption rate comparing job-worker and dlq-service.

panels.title: Consumer Lag Growth Rate (records/s) — All Services
panels.description: Rate of change of consumer lag (deriv of lag_max). Positive → lag growing (consumers falling behind). Negative → lag shrinking (consumers catching up). Near-zero → stable. Alerts should fire when this stays positive for >2 min.

panels.title: Kafka Listener Latency — p50/p90/p95/p99 (job-worker)
panels.description: p50/p90/p95/p99 Spring Kafka listener latency for job-worker.

panels.title: Kafka Listener Latency — p50/p90/p95/p99 (dlq-service)
panels.description: p50/p90/p95/p99 Spring Kafka listener latency for dlq-service.

panels.title: Kafka Listener Processing Rate (job-worker, records/s processed)
panels.description: Spring Kafka listener processing throughput for job-worker (records/s).

panels.title: Kafka Listener Mean Latency — All Consumers
panels.description: Mean Spring Kafka listener latency comparing job-worker and dlq-service.

panels.title: Kafka Send Rate by Application
panels.description: Kafka producer record send rate for job-producer and retry-dispatcher.

panels.title: Producer Request Latency p99
panels.description: p99 producer request/send latency by service.

panels.title: Kafka Producer Error Rate (records/s)
panels.description: Kafka producer record error rate for job-producer and retry-dispatcher.

panels.title: Producer Errors %
panels.description: Ratio of Kafka producer record errors to total records sent across all producers.

panels.title: Kafka Template Send Latency — retry-dispatcher (p50/p90/p95/p99)
panels.description: p50/p90/p95/p99 Spring Kafka template send latency for retry-dispatcher.

panels.title: Producer Send Throughput — All Producers
panels.description: Producer send throughput by service.

panels.title: Under-Replicated Partitions
panels.description: Kafka broker under-replicated partitions from JMX exporter. Production threshold: > 0 is critical.

panels.title: Offline Partitions
panels.description: Kafka offline partitions from JMX exporter. Any value > 0 indicates partition availability impact.

panels.title: Lag Growth (Window Continuous)
panels.description: If this value stays above zero, lag has remained continuously increasing across the selected dashboard window.

panels.title: ISR Shrink/Expand Rate
panels.description: ISR churn from Kafka broker JMX exporter. Sustained shrink spikes often precede availability incidents.

panels.title: Broker CPU Usage %
panels.description: Broker JVM process CPU from JMX exporter.

panels.title: Broker Network Throughput
panels.description: Kafka broker network in/out from BrokerTopicMetrics JMX exporter counters.

panels.title: Broker Disk Flush Throughput
panels.description: Disk flush throughput proxy from Kafka LogFlushStats JMX exporter metrics.

panels.title: Broker Produce Request Latency — p99
panels.description: Broker-side produce request latency p99 from Kafka JMX RequestMetrics.

panels.title: Broker Fetch Request Latency — p99
panels.description: Broker-side fetch request latency p99 from Kafka JMX RequestMetrics.

title: Kafka
